productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Golden Buckle Red Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Height: 31 cmWidth: 47 cmDepth: 12 cm Made of Leatherette for durability Has one zippered compartment with two inner zippers and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles for carrying ease and style Buckle design on the front and back for enhanced style Two zippered compartments in the front and back for additional space Metallic embelishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
